title: potentilla retusa
intro: Potentilla retusa, also known as creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Potentilla retusa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Potentilla retusa can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to promote skin health and treat various skin conditions.
